title: Unlimited Connected Boards in a Dashboard

posts.author: Isa1bella1 (Bella M )
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be great if the limitation to connected boards to a dashboard would be removed. Even with the enterprise package, you will only be able to connect to 50. We are constantly touching upon 20 and are looking to expand, but for this we will need to pay yearly? For 1 additional feature?

Seems very inflexible - please reconsider this! As a lot of firms will struggle with this and its definitely something that may mean that people will move to other platforms.

What are you trying to achieve

Get rid of connect boards limitations
